frontmatter.title: Social distancing library videos
frontmatter.description: I produced instructional videos for Chattahoochee Valley Libraries. This was in part a response to the COVID-19 crisis. These videos were a way to extend library services to patrons while our doors were closed to the public.

frontmatter.title: Academic Library Student Support
frontmatter.description: Here, I walk through a hypothetical student project and explain how I, as an academic librarian, would assist throughout the process.

frontmatter.title: Open Access Presentation
frontmatter.description: These are the slides and notes from a presentation I did on the state of open access in academic libraries.

frontmatter.title: Academic Library Faculty Support
frontmatter.description: I describe several key topics affecting academic libraries and how I could assist faculty with them: data management plans, open access, and intellectual property policy.

frontmatter.title: Data Management Plan: Evolving Pronouns
frontmatter.description: In conjunction with my student support project, this is an example data management plan I created.

frontmatter.title: Ex Libris OPAC Analysis
frontmatter.description: I explain the pros and cons of using the Ex Libris OPAC for an academic library.

frontmatter.title: Collection Development Policy
frontmatter.description: I worked with a team to create this original collection development policy a fictional library and critiqued three existing policies.

frontmatter.title: Selection Policy & Materials Project
frontmatter.description: I selected books with funds donated to a fictional university library. To aid selection, I compared policies from similar, real-world, institutions.

frontmatter.title: Researching the Distribution of Hispanic and Latino Children’s Books in United States Public Libraries
frontmatter.description: I worked with a team that researched the distribution of Hispanic and Latino children's books in various US libraries.

thumbnail.caption: Average percent of titles in each library according to locale

frontmatter.title: Library Twitter Text Analysis With R Presentation
frontmatter.description: These are the slides and notes from a presentation I did on using language analysis of Twitter accounts with the R programming language.

frontmatter.title: Chattahoochee Valley Environmental Analysis
frontmatter.description: I wrote this analysis of the community surrounding the Chattahoochee Valley Libraries in Columbus, GA.

frontmatter.title: How to Play Chess: a reference for novices and veterans
frontmatter.description: I've run a succesful chess program since 2017. At the time, I couldn't find any satisfactory guides to give to participants. This is one that I wrote myself which aims to cover all of the necessary knowledge without being too long or too short.
